name: Southern Fresh Peach Skillet Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Gradually add milk and stir until a soft dough forms.
3. Pat the dough 1/4 inch thick into an 8-inch heavy iron skillet, allowing some to hang over the edge.
4. Mix together the topping ingredients (sugar, salt, cinnamon).
5. Sprinkle the mixture over the fruit slices in the skillet.
6. Dot the top with 2 tablespoons of butter.
7. Fold the hanging dough toward the center, leaving a little space uncovered.
8. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes.
Serving suggestion: Serve warm with ice cream.
